name: reprise-skills
description: Workflow skills for the Reprise MCP — Clone configuration, HTML tour capture, HTML editing, data injection, and end-of-session reporting. Author once, distribute across Claude / Codex / Copilot / Gemini / Cursor / ChatGPT.

plugins.name: reprise-mcp-skills
plugins.description: Six skills that fire on Reprise MCP work: a router (`reprise-mcp`), clone configuration & debugging, HTML tour capture, HTML tour editing, data injection setup, and end-of-session recap + friction reporting. Designed to make the Reprise MCP land tasks first-time-right across every agent surface.
